description: Search for SUID binaries that may highlight system configuration risks.
parsing_hint: List of binary paths, one per line. Filter out common false positives.

description: List allowed and forbidden commands for the invoking user.
parsing_hint: Look for NOPASSWD tags or specific bin paths.

description: Get the current kernel release version.
Check if AlwaysInstallElevated is enabled for MSI installers.
parsing_hint: Check if value is 0x1 (1). If key missing, assume disabled.

description: List privilege rights assigned to the current user's access token.
parsing_hint: Parse rows searching for SeImpersonatePrivilege or SeDebugPrivilege.

command: wmic service get name,displayname,pathname,startmode | findstr /i "Auto" | findstr /i /v "C:\Windows\\" | findstr /i /v """
description: Identify unquoted service paths which could be manipulated.
parsing_hint: Extract unquoted paths that contain spaces outside of Windows default paths.
